predictions.annotationValue: Reaction=dUTP + H2O = dUMP + diphosphate + H(+); Xref=Rhea:RHEA:10248, ChEBI:CHEBI:15377, ChEBI:CHEBI:15378, ChEBI:CHEBI:33019, ChEBI:CHEBI:61555, ChEBI:CHEBI:246422; EC=3.6.1.23; PhysiologicalDirection=left-to-right; Xref=Rhea:RHEA:10249;

This enzyme is involved in nucleotide metabolism: it produces dUMP, the immediate precursor of thymidine nucleotides and it decreases the intracellular concentration of dUTP so that uracil cannot be incorporated into DNA
